title: 10 best herbal creams for hemorrhoids
description: Guggul creams helps with hemorrhoids because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The herb guggul, also known as Commiphora mukul, contains compounds that reduce swelling and pain associated with hemorrhoids. When applied topically in a cream form, it soothes the affected area, reducing discomfort and irritation. Additionally, guggul's antiseptic properties help prevent infection, promoting healing and alleviating symptoms of hemorrhoids such as itching, bleeding...
